case_title: TAYLAH CHARLOTTE HASABALLAH VS. SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE MOATTI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM HENRY SHAIN. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT TAYLAH CHARLOTTE HASABALLA. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE MOATTI IS PRESENT. PLAINITFF WAIVES SERVICE OF CROSS-CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: HENRY SHAIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOATTI, SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE AKA SC MOATTI $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE AS TO DEFENDANT MOATTI, SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE AKA SC MOATTI
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY MOATTI, SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE AKA SC MOATTI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE MOATTI, SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE AKA SC MOATTI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,300.00 FILED BY HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE AS TO DEFENDANT MOATTI, SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE AKA SC MOATTI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT MOATTI, SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE AKA SC MOATTI AS TO PLAINTIFF HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MOATTI, SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE AKA SC MOATTI
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MOATTI, SOPHIE-CHARLOTTE AKA SC MOATTI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HASABALLAH, TAYLAH CHARLOTTE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
